places.name: Museum of the Bizarre
places.description: A curious collection of oddities including a lock of Alexander Hamilton's hair and Harry Houdini's ouija board.

places.name: Stanley Rehder Carnivorous Plant Garden
places.description: Garden dedicated to native carnivorous plants and site of huge flytrap heist.

places.name: Pachinko World
places.description: The only pachinko parlor in the United States.

places.name: Pine Forest Cemetery
places.description: For more than 150 years, this cemetery has served as the final resting place for many members of Wilmington's Black community.

places.name: Cape Fear Serpentarium
places.description: An exotic reptile facility showcasing some of the rarest, most venomous snakes in the world.
